title: Design an ETL/ELT pipeline end to end
description: Lay out extract, load, transform, and validate stages with idempotent partitioned writes and a clear failure-recovery path.
body: Steps: 1. Define the source extraction (incremental by watermark/CDC where possible, full only if small). 2. Land raw data immutably in a staging/landing zone partitioned by ingestion date. 3. Transform into modeled tables idempotently, replacing by partition. 4. Reconcile row counts source-to-target and run quality checks. 5. Publish and record lineage. Rollback point: re-run a partition from immutable landing data. Validation: a rerun reproduces the partition exactly and counts reconcile; a transform that reads mutable source instead of landed data cannot be safely replayed.
